LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION TO THE SUPERIOR COURT IN AND FOR THE COUNTY OF MONTEREY IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 15, 2015, AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE BOTH PARTIES THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. BOTH PARTIES MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE PAPERS THEY FILED TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 16, 2014 AT 4:00 PM. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION TO THE SUPERIOR COURT IN AND FOR THE COUNTY OF MONTEREY IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THERE ARE ENOUGH WITNESSES FROM MONTEREY COUNTY TO BE SUFFICIENT TO TRANSFER THE CASE. MR. FINKLE SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR #7489; DEPT. 302. (302/AJR)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2015 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Action To The Superior Court In And For The County Of Monterey
Off Calendar Jan-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Appellant/Plaintiff THOMAS SCHELLENBERG, Tel. No. (831) 595-2611 appearing in pro per;
Respondent/Defendant HARRY FINKLE, Tel No. (831) 622-9124, appearing telephonically for Respondent;

RULING - A R G U E D - The court vacated its tentative ruling, and ruled as follows: RESPONDENT/DEFENDANT HARRY FINKLE'S Motion To Transfer Action To The Superior Court In And For The County Of Monterey is GRANTED. The Court finds three witnesses from Monterey County to be sufficient to transfer the case. MR. FINKLE SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Action To The Superior Court In And For The County Of Monterey
Off Calendar Dec-16-2014 Continued To Jan-15-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT HARRY FINKLE'S Motion To Transfer Action To The Superior Court In And For The County Of Monterey is continued to January 15, 2015 to give both parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Both parties must deliver courtesy copies of the papers they filed to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 16, 2014 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
